objectTemplate.name: UserTemplate-Person-Base
objectTemplate.description: Template canónico base UPeU v3.1 (Fase 1 — eduPerson 202208). Bloques A-H + D6 + I + J + J3 + K + P + Q4 + Q5 + S implementados. Schema: sciback:person (canónico) + upeu:local (LAMB). Libro Cap.9 compliant. Bloque J3: calcula primaryAffiliation desde affiliations multi-valor (normal, prioridad faculty>staff>student>alum>affiliate). Bloque K: override jubilados→alum (Decisión B, strong). Bloque H: grace periods diferenciados por motivoCese (fallecimiento=0d, despido=7d, termino_contrato=0d, renuncia/mutuo_disenso/otro=30d, jubilacion=nunca). Bloque R: REMOVIDO (reemplazado por K). D6: OrgType EP desde academicProgramCode. Bloque J: lambDocNum→identityDocuments. J2: limpia taxId. Bloque P: PBAC Position desde lambPositionId. VOCABULARIO: todo lowercase eduPerson 202208 (faculty|staff|student|alum|affiliate). EMPLOYEE y AFFILIATE-CU eliminados del vocabulario canónico.

script.code: if (personalNumber != null && basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() != '') { return basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() }; def gn = givenName != null ? basic.norm(basic.stringify(givenName)) : ''; def fn = familyName != null ? basic.norm(basic.stringify(familyName)) : ''; if (gn == '' && fn == '') return null; def initial = gn.take(1); def lastname = fn.replaceAll(' ', ''); return (initial + lastname).take(8) + iterationToken

if (givenName == null && familyName == null) return null; def gn = givenName != null ? basic.stringify(givenName).trim() : ''; def fn = familyName != null ? basic.stringify(familyName).trim() : ''; return (gn + ' ' + fn).trim()
if (personalNumber == null) return null; def pn = basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim(); if (pn == '') return null; return pn + '@upeu.edu.pe'
personalNumber != null && basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() != ''
if (personalNumber == null) return null; def pn = basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim(); if (pn == '') return null; return pn + '@upeu.edu.pe'
personalNumber != null && basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() != ''

if (primaryAffiliation == null) return null; def val = basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase(); def roleMap = ['student': 'R-Affiliation-Student', 'faculty': 'R-Affiliation-Faculty', 'staff': 'R-Affiliation-Staff', 'alum': 'R-Affiliation-Alumni', 'affiliate': 'R-Affiliation-Affiliate']; return roleMap[val]
primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim() != '' && ['student','faculty','staff','alum','affiliate'].contains(basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase())

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-estudiante-by-cycle
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Estudiante-Pregrado/Posgrado/Doctorado según studentCycle. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: def raw = studentCycle; def n = null; try { def s = (raw instanceof java.util.Collection) ? (raw.isEmpty() ? null : raw.max { it.toString() as Integer }) : raw?.toString(); if (s != null) n = Integer.parseInt(s.trim()) } catch (Exception e) { log.warn("D.2: studentCycle no parseable '{}' en {}", raw, focus?.name) }; if (n == null) return 'BR-Estudiante-Pregrado'; if (n >= 9) return 'BR-Estudiante-Doctorado'; if (n >= 7) return 'BR-Estudiante-Posgrado'; return 'BR-Estudiante-Pregrado'
def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() : ''; affil == 'student' && studentCycle != null

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-docente-tc
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Docente-TC a usuarios con primaryAffiliation=faculty (eduPerson 202208). Diferenciación TC/TP pendiente de Fase 5 LAMB inbound. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'faculty'

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-admin-area
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Admin-Area a usuarios con primaryAffiliation=staff (eduPerson 202208). Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'staff'

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-egresado
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Egresado a usuarios con primaryAffiliation=alum. Resuelve los ~30.000 egresados activos sin BR-Egresado. Patrón idéntico a D.3/D.4. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'alum'

mapping.name: D-autoassign-ar-koha-patron-alumni
mapping.description: Auto-asigna AR-Koha-Patron-Alumni a alumni con activation/validTo = 31-Dic(graduationYear+2). Implementa policy UPeU de 2 años de acceso Koha post-graduación. Reemplaza el inducement estático que tenía BR-Egresado (no podía portar validTo per-holder). Semancik Cap. 7 — Time-Constrained Roles.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'alum'

mapping.name: D-autoassign-br-personal-general
mapping.description: Auto-asigna BR-Personal-General (piso mínimo) a todo usuario con primaryAffiliation=staff o faculty (eduPerson 202208). Resuelve los 29.730 trabajadores activos sin BR que no llegan a LDAP/Keycloak. AR-LDAP-Person ya inducido en otros BRs — MidPoint lo deduplica. Opción A: lógica en base template.

script.code: def aff = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() : ''; aff == 'staff' || aff == 'faculty'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-student
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Student cuando primaryAffiliation='student'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'student'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-staff
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Staff cuando primaryAffiliation='staff'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'staff'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-faculty
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Faculty cuando primaryAffiliation='faculty'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'faculty'

mapping.name: D5-aux-archetype-alum
mapping.description: Auto-asigna archetype auxiliar AuxAff-Alum cuando primaryAffiliation='alum'.

script.code: primaryAffiliation != null && basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() == 'alum'

mapping.name: D6-assign-org-ep-from-academicProgramCode
mapping.description: Auto-asigna OrgType Escuela Profesional (EP) desde sb:academicProgramCode. Busca OrgType.name = código EP (ej: EP-ARQ). Solo afiliaciones student/alum. Libro Cap.10 + iga-canonical-standards Pilar 3.

script.code: academicProgramCode == null ? null : ((academicProgramCode instanceof java.util.Collection) ? (academicProgramCode.isEmpty() ? null : (academicProgramCode.first()?.toString()?.trim()?.startsWith('EP-') ? academicProgramCode.first().toString().trim() : null)) : (basic.stringify(academicProgramCode).trim()?.startsWith('EP-') ? basic.stringify(academicProgramCode).trim() : null))

def code = (academicProgramCode instanceof java.util.Collection) ? (academicProgramCode.isEmpty() ? null : academicProgramCode.first()?.toString()?.trim()) : (academicProgramCode != null ? basic.stringify(academicProgramCode).trim() : null); def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() : ''; code != null && code.startsWith('EP-') && (affil == 'student' || affil == 'alum')

mapping.name: E-assign-org-from-costCenter
mapping.description: Auto-asigna membership a OrgType (area.*) desde costCenter. costCenter = 'area.{ID_SEDEAREA}' inbound desde LAMB Trabajadores. OrgTypes preexistentes en 050-GobiernoAdmin.xml.

script.code: costCenter != null ? basic.stringify(costCenter).trim() : null
costCenter != null && basic.stringify(costCenter).trim().matches('\\d+')

def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; if (ls != 'draft' && ls != 'proposed') return null; def SCIBACK_NS = 'urn:sciback:midpoint:person'; def AFFIL_OIDS = ['79ad22c7-b828-4b8c-a562-2ee01b214d7f','94a03f65-e866-4d49-a996-26c4dc227413','0da0b3b8-a93b-4765-ad71-30c535ff7512','7d4e89fb-163c-478c-a224-4e4be733bc1b','485dc678-94a5-4d20-9463-71568c625a33','31f25974-62c9-404a-a038-b17a08059fe5'] as Set; def VALID_AFFILIATIONS = ['student','faculty','staff','alum','affiliate'] as Set; def reasons = []; def pn = personalNumber != null ? basic.stringify(personalNumber).trim() : ''; if (pn == '') reasons << 'PR-02: personalNumber ausente o vacio'; def hasPrimary = false; def primaryDocNumber = null; def primaryDocType = null; try { def primQN = new javax.xml.namespace.QName(SCIBACK_NS, 'primary'); def numQN = new javax.xml.namespace.QName(SCIBACK_NS, 'number'); def typeQN = new javax.xml.namespace.QName(SCIBACK_NS, 'type'); def primPath = com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath.create(primQN); def numPath = com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath.create(numQN); def typePath = com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath.create(typeQN); def docs = identityDocuments; if (docs != null) { def docList = (docs instanceof List) ? docs : [docs]; docList.each { doc -> def primProp = doc?.findProperty(primPath); if ('true' == primProp?.realValue?.toString()) { hasPrimary = true; primaryDocNumber = doc?.findProperty(numPath)?.realValue?.toString(); primaryDocType = doc?.findProperty(typePath)?.realValue?.toString() } } } } catch (Exception e) { log.warn('Bloque G: error leyendo identityDocuments en {}: {}', focus?.name, e.message) }; if (!hasPrimary && taxId != null) { def txStr = basic.stringify(taxId)?.trim(); if (txStr?.startsWith('urn:schac:personalUniqueID:')) { hasPrimary = true; def parts = txStr.split(':'); primaryDocNumber = parts.length > 0 ? parts[parts.length - 1] : null; primaryDocType = 'DNI' } }; if (!hasPrimary) { reasons << 'PR-03: sin documento de identidad primario (primary=true)' } else if (primaryDocNumber != null) { def docType = primaryDocType?.toUpperCase() ?: 'DNI'; if (docType == 'DNI' || docType == '') { if (!(primaryDocNumber ==~ /^\d{8}$/)) reasons << "PR-04: DNI invalido '${primaryDocNumber}' (debe ser 8 digitos)" } }; def hasAffil = focus?.assignment?.any { a -> a.targetRef?.oid in AFFIL_OIDS }; if (!hasAffil) reasons << 'PR-05: sin rol R-Affiliation-* asignado'; def primAffil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() : ''; if (!primAffil || !(primAffil in VALID_AFFILIATIONS)) reasons << "PR-06: primaryAffiliation invalido ('${primAffil}'). Validos: ${VALID_AFFILIATIONS.sort().join('|')}"; def email = emailAddress != null ? basic.stringify(emailAddress) : ''; if (!email.endsWith('@upeu.edu.pe')) reasons << "PR-07: emailAddress institucional invalido ('${email}')"; def gn = givenName != null ? basic.stringify(givenName).trim() : ''; if (gn == '') reasons << 'PR-08a: givenName ausente o vacio'; def fn = familyName != null ? basic.stringify(familyName).trim() : ''; if (fn == '') reasons << 'PR-08b: familyName ausente o vacio'; if (reasons) { log.info('Bloque G [{}]: {} fallos: {}', focus?.name, reasons.size(), reasons.join(' | ')); return reasons }; return null
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'
import java.time.Instant; def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; if (ls != 'draft' && ls != 'proposed') return null; return Instant.now().toString()
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; if (ls != 'draft' && ls != 'proposed') return null; return 'BloqueG@UserTemplate-Person-Base'
def ls = lifecycleState != null ? basic.stringify(lifecycleState) : ''; ls == 'draft' || ls == 'proposed'

mapping.name: L-derive-lifecycleState-from-live-affiliations
mapping.description: Derivación canónica única de lifecycleState (reemplaza F+H+H2). strong, idempotente, sin guard anti-circular (NO lee lifecycleState). liveAff = sciback:affiliations ∩ vocabulario canónico. liveAff≠∅ → active (o draft si perfil incompleto); liveAff=∅ con terminationDate → archived (leaver); liveAff=∅ sin terminationDate → draft (alta incompleta). Salvaguarda académica: con alum/student en affiliations SIEMPRE active. iga-canonical §1.2/§3.2 + best-practices §1.2/§4.5.

script.code: terminationDate != null

mapping.name: auto-archive-after-termination-grace-period
mapping.description: NEUTRALIZADO 2026-05-29 (lifecycleState=deprecated → MidPoint NO lo evalúa). Su lógica de archive staff/faculty tras grace period fue absorbida por el Bloque L (derivación canónica única). Se conserva el cuerpo para trazabilidad/rollback. El grace period ya NO vive en el template: la temporalidad post-cese la gobierna el token en sciback:affiliations (searchScript del worker, FEC_TERMINO>=SYSDATE-730). [original] Transición active→archived para staff/faculty con grace period diferenciado por motivoCese.

mapping.name: H2-archive-on-total-affiliation-loss
mapping.description: NEUTRALIZADO 2026-05-29 (lifecycleState=deprecated → MidPoint NO lo evalúa). Su caso (ex-trabajador sin ninguna afiliación viva pero con terminationDate → archived) está ahora cubierto por el Bloque L rama (2). Se conserva para trazabilidad/rollback. [original] Archiva al ex-trabajador sin ninguna afiliación viva pero con terminationDate.

script.code: if (birthDate == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(birthDate); if (!(v ==~ /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)) { log.warn("UPeU template: birthDate invalido '{}' en {} (esperado YYYY-MM-DD)", v, focus?.name) }; return v

if (gender == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(gender); if (!(v ==~ /^[0129]$/)) { log.warn("UPeU template: gender invalido '{}' en {} (esperado 0|1|2|9 ISO 5218)", v, focus?.name) }; return v

if (nationality == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(nationality); if (!(v ==~ /^[A-Z]{3}$/)) { log.warn("UPeU template: nationality no-canonico '{}' en {} (esperado ISO 3166-1 alpha-3)", v, focus?.name) }; return v

if (hireDate == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(hireDate); if (!(v ==~ /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)) { log.warn("UPeU template: hireDate invalido '{}' en {} (esperado YYYY-MM-DD)", v, focus?.name) }; return v

mapping.name: P-assign-position-from-lambPositionId
mapping.description: Auto-asigna ServiceType Position desde upeu:lambPositionId. Busca ServiceType.identifier = lambPositionId. Solo para FACULTY y STAFF activos. Libro Cap.9 PBAC.

script.code: lambPositionId != null ? basic.stringify(lambPositionId).trim() ?: null : null

def v = lambPositionId != null ? basic.stringify(lambPositionId).trim() : ''; def affil = primaryAffiliation != null ? basic.stringify(primaryAffiliation).trim().toLowerCase() : ''; v != '' && (affil == 'faculty' || affil == 'staff')

mapping.name: I-jpegPhoto-fetch-from-photoUrl
mapping.description: Fetcha foto JPEG desde URL MinIO LAMB (upeu:photoUrl) y la escribe en jpegPhoto. strength=normal: no sobreescribe si Entra ID (strong) ya puso una foto. Solo actúa si photoUrl tiene valor. Timeout connect 5s / read 10s. try/catch retorna null en error.

script.code: if (photoUrl == null) return null; def urlStr = basic.stringify(photoUrl)?.trim(); if (!urlStr) return null; try { def url = new java.net.URL(urlStr); def conn = (java.net.HttpURLConnection) url.openConnection(); conn.setConnectTimeout(5000); conn.setReadTimeout(10000); conn.setRequestMethod('GET'); conn.setRequestProperty('User-Agent', 'MidPoint-UPeU-IGA/1.0'); def status = conn.getResponseCode(); if (status != 200) { log.warn('Bloque I jpegPhoto: HTTP {} al fetchear {} para {}', status, urlStr, focus?.name); return null }; def is = conn.getInputStream(); def baos = new java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream(); def buf = new byte[8192]; int n; while ((n = is.read(buf)) != -1) { baos.write(buf, 0, n) }; is.close(); def bytes = baos.toByteArray(); if (bytes.length == 0) { log.warn('Bloque I jpegPhoto: respuesta vacía desde {} para {}', urlStr, focus?.name); return null }; log.debug('Bloque I jpegPhoto: {} bytes leídos desde {} para {}', bytes.length, urlStr, focus?.name); return bytes } catch (Exception e) { log.warn('Bloque I jpegPhoto: error fetcheando {} para {}: {}', urlStr, focus?.name, e.message); return null }
photoUrl != null && basic.stringify(photoUrl)?.trim() != ''

if (terminationDate == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(terminationDate); if (!(v ==~ /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/)) { log.warn("UPeU template: terminationDate invalido '{}' en {} (esperado YYYY-MM-DD)", v, focus?.name) }; return v

mapping.name: S-schacPersonalTitle-from-conferredDegreeAbbrev
mapping.description: Deriva el título honorífico canónico SCHAC schacPersonalTitle desde sciback:conferredDegreeAbbrev (Bach./Mg./Dr., IIA Secretaría General vía resource Oracle LAMB Grados v1). strong: el template es la única autoridad del dato derivado. Retorna null cuando la abreviatura es nula/vacía (títulos profesionales sin tratamiento honorífico) — limpia el valor obsoleto. Libro Cap.9 Focus Processing.

script.code: if (conferredDegreeAbbrev == null) return null; def v = basic.stringify(conferredDegreeAbbrev).trim(); return v != '' ? v : null

mapping.name: Q4-birthright-koha-librarian-crai
mapping.description: Auto-asigna AR-Koha-Librarian al personal del CRAI según costCenter (área de biblioteca). Fuente de verdad: ID_SEDEAREA de Oracle LAMB. Aplica a cualquier afiliación (faculty o staff). Movido al base template para cobertura universal.

script.code: def cc = costCenter != null ? basic.stringify(costCenter).trim() : ''; ['area.97','area.522','area.625'].contains(cc)

mapping.name: Q5-birthright-koha-crai-tier
mapping.description: Auto-asigna AR-Koha-Librarian-{tier} según cargo (ID_PUESTO) del personal CRAI, resuelto via LookupTable LT-CRAI-Puesto-Tier. Fallback al tier mínimo (circulacion) ante cargo desconocido. Aplica a cualquier afiliación. Movido al base template para cobertura universal.

script.code: def cc = costCenter != null ? basic.stringify(costCenter).trim() : ''; ['area.97','area.522','area.625'].contains(cc)

mapping.name: D7-structural-archetype-priority
mapping.description: Archetype estructural único según primaryAffiliation (single-valor, ya priorizado por J3/K). FIX 2026-05-27: source cambiado de affiliations (multi-valor) a primaryAffiliation (single-valor) para evitar que MidPoint evalúe el mapping una vez por valor y cree doble archetype assignment. J3 calcula primaryAffiliation desde affiliations (faculty>staff>student>alum>affiliate). Bloque K override jubilados→alum (strong). D7 corre en wave posterior, leyendo valor final. MidPoint Book Cap. 8-9: archetype assignment centralizado en template.

script.code: if (primaryAffiliation == null) return null; def val = primaryAffiliation.toString().trim().toLowerCase(); def nameMap = ['faculty': 'archetype-user-employee-faculty', 'staff': 'archetype-user-employee-staff', 'student': 'archetype-user-student', 'alum': 'archetype-user-alumni']; nameMap[val]
primaryAffiliation != null && primaryAffiliation.toString().trim() != '' && ['faculty','staff','student','alum'].contains(primaryAffiliation.toString().trim().toLowerCase())

mapping.name: J3-primaryAffiliation-from-affiliations-priority
mapping.description: Calcula primaryAffiliation desde affiliations multi-valor por prioridad eduPerson 202208: faculty(1) > staff(2) > student(3) > alum(4) > affiliate(5). FIX 2026-05-29 (multi-afiliación §3.2): strength normal→STRONG. Causa raíz del limbo: con normal, un recompute sin delta NO sobrescribía un primaryAffiliation stale (ej. 'staff' de un ex-trabajador cuya cuenta Trabajador fue desproyectada y cuyo affiliations ya es ['alum']). strong fuerza recálculo desde el affiliations VIVO en cada recompute → al morir el empleo pero persistir lo académico, primaryAffiliation pasa de 'staff' a 'alum' correctamente (pérdida de faculty/employee NO elimina alum/student). Bloque K (strong) sigue conviviendo: para jubilado puro K='alum' (J3 retorna null porque affiliations vacío de worker) → K gana; para no-jubilado K retorna null → J3 gana. Nunca ambos producen valor a la vez para el mismo foco.

script.code: def raw = affiliations; def lst = (raw instanceof java.util.Collection) ? raw : (raw != null ? [raw] : []); !lst.isEmpty()

mapping.name: K-jubilados-force-alum-decision-b
mapping.description: Override: jubilados sin afiliación activa de mayor prioridad → alum. Implementa Decisión B. strong: override J3 (normal) para jubilados puros. Si hay faculty/staff/student activo, retorna null y J3 calcula. IIA: ENOC.PLLA_CESE.ID_MOTIVO_CESE.

mapping.name: K2-formerRole-for-jubilados
mapping.description: Registra el rol anterior (staff|faculty) en upeu:formerRole cuando el jubilado es clasificado como alum (Bloque K, Decisión B). Permite que Koha exponga FORMER_ROLE. Solo actúa cuando no hay afiliación activa de mayor prioridad. normal: dato complementario.

script.code: motivoCese != null && basic.stringify(motivoCese).trim().toLowerCase() == 'jubilacion'

mapping.name: J-build-identityDocuments-from-lambDocType-lambDocNum
mapping.description: Construye el contenedor canónico sciback:identityDocuments desde upeu:lambDocType (tipo LAMB) + upeu:lambDocNum (número doc raw). IIA exclusivo: LAMB inbound. taxId legacy eliminado como source (DT-5: rompe ciclo J/J2). strong: revalúa en cada recompute. MidPoint Book Cap.9 + eduPerson 202208 schacPersonalUniqueID.

script.code: def rawDocNum = lambDocNum != null ? basic.stringify(lambDocNum).trim() : ''; if (!rawDocNum) return null; def rawType = lambDocType != null ? basic.stringify(lambDocType).trim() : ''; def typeId = rawType != '' ? rawType : null; def INVALID_TYPES = ['0', '97', '98', '99'] as Set; if (typeId != null && INVALID_TYPES.contains(typeId)) { log.debug('Bloque J: tipo LAMB {} inválido para {} — skip identityDocuments', typeId, focus?.name); return null }; def docType = 'DNI'; def verifiedBy = 'RENIEC'; def countryIssue = 'PER'; switch (typeId) { case '1': docType = 'DNI'; verifiedBy = 'RENIEC'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '24': docType = 'DNI'; verifiedBy = 'RENIEC'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '4': docType = 'CE'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '6': docType = 'CE'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '31': docType = 'CE'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '7': docType = 'PASSPORT'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = ''; break; case '9': docType = 'PASSPORT'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = ''; break; case '22': docType = 'PTP'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; case '23': docType = 'CPP'; verifiedBy = 'MIGRACIONES'; countryIssue = 'PER'; break; default: if (typeId != null) { log.warn('Bloque J: ID_TIPODOCUMENTO desconocido "{}" para {} — asumiendo DNI', typeId, focus?.name) }; docType = 'DNI'; verifiedBy = 'RENIEC'; countryIssue = 'PER' }; def NS = 'urn:sciback:midpoint:person'; try { def factory = midpoint.prismContext.itemFactory(); def containerDef = midpoint.prismContext.schemaRegistry.findComplexTypeDefinitionByType(new javax.xml.namespace.QName(NS, 'IdentityDocumentType')); if (containerDef == null) { log.error('Bloque J: IdentityDocumentType no encontrado en registry — verifique schema sciback. user={}', focus?.name); return null }; def cv = factory.createContainerValue(); def setStr = { String localName, String value -> if (value == null || value == '') return; def qn = new javax.xml.namespace.QName(NS, localName); def propDef = containerDef.findPropertyDefinition(com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath.create(qn)); if (propDef == null) { log.warn('Bloque J: propiedad {} no encontrada en IdentityDocumentType', localName); return }; def prop = factory.createProperty(qn, propDef); prop.setRealValue(value); cv.add(prop) }; setStr('type', docType); setStr('number', rawDocNum); setStr('primary', 'true'); setStr('verifiedBy', verifiedBy); if (countryIssue) setStr('countryOfIssue', countryIssue); log.debug('Bloque J: identityDocuments construido type={} number={} verifiedBy={} para {}', docType, rawDocNum, verifiedBy, focus?.name); return cv } catch (Exception e) { log.error('Bloque J: error construyendo identityDocuments para {}: {}', focus?.name, e.message); return null }

def rawDocNum = lambDocNum != null ? basic.stringify(lambDocNum).trim() : ''; def rawType = lambDocType != null ? basic.stringify(lambDocType).trim() : ''; def INVALID = ['0', '97', '98', '99'] as Set; def typeOk = rawType == '' || !INVALID.contains(rawType); rawDocNum != '' && typeOk

mapping.name: J2-clear-taxId-after-identityDocuments-migration
mapping.description: Limpia sciback:taxId (deprecated) una vez que sciback:identityDocuments tiene valor. Finaliza la migración del campo legacy. strong: se evalúa en cada recompute. El campo taxId permanece en el schema para retrocompatibilidad pero debe quedar vacío.

script.code: null

def docs = identityDocuments; if (docs == null) return false; try { def docList = (docs instanceof java.util.Collection) ? docs : [docs]; def primPath = com.evolveum.midpoint.prism.path.ItemPath.create(new javax.xml.namespace.QName('urn:sciback:midpoint:person', 'primary')); return docList.any { doc -> def primProp = doc?.findProperty(primPath); primProp != null && 'true' == primProp?.realValue?.toString() } } catch (Exception e) { log.warn('Bloque J2: error verificando identityDocuments en {}: {}', focus?.name, e.message); return false }
